provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, young female reptilian alien with bright olive-green scales showing youth, a small developing crest ridge, wide curious amber eyes, a restless tail, wearing a simple dark leather tunic with a healer trainee sash in white across the chest, a small medical pouch at the hip with basic wound dressings, soft boots, her hands are still too clean — she has not treated her first real wound yet
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
